positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration of a forest glen at dawn. The central focus is a playful woodland animal (such as a fox or deer) nestled among oversized, bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns. The style should be intricate linework mixed with soft watercolor washes, giving a clean, graphic, yet ethereal feel. Use a limited, nature-inspired color palette: deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, mossy greens, and glowing pops of amber and cyan for the bioluminescence. Composition must be perfectly centered, featuring strong, simplified silhouettes against a gradient background for maximum print visibility. High contrast areas are key. Clean lines, excellent detail, suitable for apparel printing.
